title: Global Retailer Migrates from AWS to GCP
challenge: Legacy AWS infrastructure with high operational costs and limited scalability during peak seasons
solution: Full-stack migration to GCP with GKE for containerized workloads and Cloud Spanner for global inventory
outcome_summary: 40% reduction in cloud spend, 99.99% uptime during Black Friday

title: Insurance Company Builds AI Claims Processing
challenge: Manual claims processing taking 14 days average, high error rates, poor customer satisfaction
solution: GenAI-powered claims triage using Vertex AI with Document AI for extraction and Gemini for assessment
outcome_summary: Claims processing reduced from 14 days to 2 days, 85% automation rate

title: Telecom Giant Modernizes Data Platform
challenge: Siloed data across legacy Teradata and Oracle systems, inability to perform real-time customer analytics
solution: Unified data lakehouse on BigQuery with Dataflow for real-time streaming and Looker for self-service BI
outcome_summary: Real-time customer insights enabled, 60% faster reporting, $2M annual savings on legacy licenses

title: Manufacturing Firm Adopts Google Workspace
client_description: Global manufacturer with 15,000 employees across 12 countries
challenge: Remote work friction with on-prem Exchange and SharePoint, collaboration gaps between factory and office workers
solution: Full Google Workspace deployment with Gemini for Workspace, AppSheet for frontline worker apps
outcome_summary: 90% employee adoption in 3 months, 35% reduction in IT support tickets

title: FinTech Startup Scales on GCP from Day One
client_description: Series B fintech with rapid growth trajectory
challenge: On-prem colocation couldn't keep pace with 10x user growth, compliance requirements for financial data
solution: Cloud-native architecture on GCP with Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, and Assured Workloads for compliance
outcome_summary: Scaled from 100K to 1M users without downtime, achieved SOC 2 compliance

title: Healthcare Provider Deploys Predictive Analytics
challenge: Patient readmission rates above industry average, no predictive capabilities for resource planning
solution: ML pipeline on Vertex AI for readmission risk prediction, integrated with EHR via Healthcare API

title: E-commerce Platform Migrates from Azure to GCP
challenge: Azure costs escalating, need for better ML infrastructure for recommendation engine
solution: Migration to GCP with focus on Vertex AI for recommendations and Cloud Bigtable for real-time user profiles
outcome_summary: 30% infrastructure cost reduction, 25% improvement in recommendation accuracy

title: Logistics Company Builds Real-Time Fleet Analytics
challenge: Batch-only analytics on fleet data, no real-time visibility into route optimization or fuel consumption
solution: Real-time streaming pipeline with Pub/Sub, Dataflow, and BigQuery for fleet telemetry analysis
outcome_summary: Real-time fleet visibility, 15% fuel cost reduction, 20% improvement in delivery times
